title: VeinScythe
description: Mine entire ore veins, tree canopies, and stone deposits with a single break.
body:
# **_🪓 VeinScythe_**

VeinScythe is a lightweight quality-of-life mod for Minecraft 26.1 (Fabric) that lets you mine entire veins of blocks instantly.

Break one block, and all connected blocks of the same type are mined automatically. It works with ores, logs, plants, and more — making mining faster, smoother, and way more satisfying.

## ⚙️ How it works
VeinScythe uses a smart system to detect nearby connected blocks and mine them together. It’s optimized for performance and runs server-side, so no lag.

To keep things balanced:
• Limited number of blocks per vein (default: 64)  
• Maximum reach distance (default: 6 blocks)  
• Tool durability is consumed  
• Hunger exhaustion is applied  
• Built-in cooldown system  

## ✨ Features
• Mine full ore veins, trees, and block clusters  
• Toggle per player (press V or use command)  
• Optional sneak-to-activate mode  
• Works with modded blocks (custom config support)  
• Fully configurable with JSON file  
• Server-friendly and optimized  

## 🧩 Categories
Enable or disable mining for:
• Ores (including deepslate)  
• Logs / wood  
• Plants  
• Stone (optional)  

## ⌨️ Controls
• V → Toggle vein mining  
• Left Alt → Hold to temporarily enable  

## 💬 Commands
/veinminer toggle  
/veinminer reload  
/veinminer maxblocks <value>  
/veinminer list  
/veinminer reset <player>  


VeinScythe keeps Minecraft balanced while removing the boring grind. Mine smarter, not harder.
